prompt: Our gh-aw workflow needs to run on fork PRs from external contributors. I'm worried about security — what's the right way to handle this? We need to read their code but never execute it.

assertions.text: Recommends forks: ["*"] in the pull_request trigger frontmatter
Mentions the platform auto-restore of .github/ from base branch (gh-aw#23769 or equivalent explanation)
References Checkout-GhAwPr.ps1 or equivalent defense-in-depth restore pattern for workflow_dispatch
Recommends integrity filtering (min-integrity: approved) to filter untrusted content
Emphasizes treating PR contents as passive data — read/diff but never execute with elevated credentials
Explains the pwn-request threat model (checkout + execution of fork code with GITHUB_TOKEN)
Explicitly warns against running dotnet build, npm install, or scripts on PR code inside the agent
